prompt_text: Standing in a tropical island port
prompt_label: random "Standing in a tropical island port"

localspace_list.name: Dockmaster's Office
localspace_list.description: A modest administrative building with a wide front desk and shelves of maritime logs, offering a clear view of the pier through large windows.

localspace_list.name: Fishing Gear Shed
localspace_list.description: A small, cluttered shed filled with nets, rods, and tackle boxes, smelling of salt and old bait.

localspace_list.name: Ticket Kiosk
localspace_list.description: A compact booth with a counter and a stool, where a lone attendant sells ferry passes and dock permits.

localspace_list.name: Watchman's Alcove
localspace_list.description: A narrow, shaded alcove tucked behind a stack of crates, where a guard keeps an eye on the dock's activity.

localspace_list.name: Repair Workshop
localspace_list.description: A small workshop with workbenches, tools hanging on the walls, and half-repaired boat parts scattered about.

localspace_list.name: Storage Locker
localspace_list.description: A cramped storage room lined with metal lockers and coiled ropes, dimly lit by a single bulb.

localspace_list.name: Crew Lounge
localspace_list.description: A cozy break room with a worn sofa, a small table, and a kettle, offering a quiet retreat from the dock's bustle.

localspace_list.name: Signal Post
localspace_list.description: A tiny, windowless booth housing a signal lamp and a lever mechanism, barely large enough for one person to stand.

localspace_list.name: Bait Shop
localspace_list.description: A small shop with a counter, coolers of bait, and shelves of fishing supplies, smelling of brine and earth.

localspace_list.name: Lifeguard Station
localspace_list.description: A compact wooden stand with a raised seat and a ring buoy, offering a clear sightline over the dock's edge.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Boathouse
localspace_list.description: A dilapidated boathouse with a caved-in roof and walls choked with vines, its entrance completely blocked by debris.

localspace_list.name: Sunken Pier Ruins
localspace_list.description: The skeletal remains of an old pier, with broken pilings jutting from the water and tangled wreckage visible beneath the surface.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Cargo Vault
localspace_list.description: A concrete bunker with a rusted steel door welded shut, its small ventilation grates revealing only darkness inside.

localspace_list.name: Flooded Bilge Pit
localspace_list.description: A shallow, water-filled depression in the dock's surface, surrounded by a low chain-link fence and warning signs.

localspace_list.name: Abandoned Crane Base
localspace_list.description: A rusted crane pedestal with a broken control panel, its arm long since collapsed into the water nearby.

localspace_list.name: Fuel Station
localspace_list.description: A small, open-sided shelter with a fuel pump and a hose, the concrete floor stained with old oil patches.

localspace_list.name: Net Mending Area
localspace_list.description: A shaded workspace with wooden benches and spools of twine, where fishing nets are stretched and repaired.

localspace_list.name: Dockmaster's Residence
localspace_list.description: A spacious two-story house with a wraparound porch, cluttered with nautical decor and offering a panoramic view of the harbor.

localspace_list.name: Storage Closet
localspace_list.description: A tiny, cramped storage closet with shelves lining the walls, filled with old tools and dusty crates.

localspace_list.name: Small Workshop

localspace_list.name: Cozy Pantry

prompt_text: Standing in a tropical island port
prompt_label: random "Standing in a tropical island port"

localspace_list.name: Harbormaster's Office
localspace_list.description: A modest two-story building with a wide front porch, its windows dark and empty. The interior is spacious and cluttered with old shipping logs and dusty furniture, but no one is present.

localspace_list.name: The Net Loft
localspace_list.description: A small, single-room wooden shack filled with coiled ropes and hanging nets. The space feels cramped but orderly, with a single oil lamp casting dim light.

localspace_list.name: Smoked Fish Shack
localspace_list.description: A compact, weathered hut with a smoking chimney. The air inside is thick with the scent of brine and woodsmoke; a lone figure tends a rack of drying fish.

localspace_list.name: Tide Pool Kiosk
localspace_list.description: A tiny, open-sided stall perched near the waterline, its counter covered in scattered seashells. A solitary vendor stands behind the counter, idly polishing a shell.

localspace_list.name: Rope and Tackle Shed
localspace_list.description: A small, windowless shed packed with coils of hemp rope, pulleys, and iron hooks. The floor is gritty with sand, and the air smells of tar.

localspace_list.name: Abandoned Dinghy Shelter
localspace_list.description: A cramped lean-to with a rotting wooden frame, just large enough to hold a single overturned rowboat. The space is empty and dusty.

localspace_list.name: The Bait House
localspace_list.description: A small, low-ceilinged building lined with wooden bins of sand and bait scraps. The interior is cool and damp, with a faint fishy odor.

localspace_list.name: Lighthouse Keeper's Closet
localspace_list.description: A tiny, windowless storage room tucked beneath the lighthouse stairs, holding a few old oil cans and a mop. It is barely large enough to stand in.

localspace_list.name: Fishermen's Rest Tavern
localspace_list.description: A modest, single-room tavern with a long bar and scattered tables. The space is cozy but not cramped, with a stone fireplace and nautical decorations.

localspace_list.name: Signal Bell Tower
localspace_list.description: A tiny, open-air wooden platform supporting a rusted iron bell. The structure is just large enough for one person to stand and ring the bell.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Warehouse
localspace_list.description: A large, dilapidated brick warehouse with a caved-in roof and boarded-up doors. The structure is completely sealed and impassable, its interior inaccessible.

localspace_list.name: Sunken Dry Dock
localspace_list.description: A massive, flooded concrete basin half-filled with silt and debris. The water is murky, and the surrounding walls are cracked and overgrown, making entry impossible.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Icehouse
localspace_list.description: A squat, windowless stone building with a heavy iron door bolted shut. Moss and rust cover the hinges, and the structure appears abandoned and impenetrable.

localspace_list.name: Caved-In Well
localspace_list.description: A small, circular stone well with a collapsed wooden cover. The opening is choked with rubble and dirt, and no passage is possible.

localspace_list.name: Blocked Storm Drain
localspace_list.description: A wide, arched brick drainpipe completely filled with compacted mud and broken timbers. The entrance is visible but utterly impassable.

localspace_list.name: The Oar and Anchor
localspace_list.description: A small, tidy workshop with a workbench and shelves of carved oars and ship fittings. The space is unoccupied and quiet.

localspace_list.name: Chart Room
localspace_list.description: A modest room with a large central table covered in nautical maps and navigation tools. The walls are lined with cabinets, and the space feels orderly.

localspace_list.name: Sunset Wharf Market Hall
localspace_list.description: A vast, open-air pavilion with high wooden beams and a corrugated roof. Long tables and stalls fill the space, but it is currently empty and silent.
